On 2002-02-28 22:00, Dave Pimlott wrote:
> 
> I did reply, oh well...

Probably your reply didn't make it to the gnats database.
You can make sure it does, by adding bug-followup@freebsd.org to the Cc list :)

> I am still using the same board with the same peripherals, with
> a new mainboard and processor.  The problem hasn't resurfaced since I upgraded
> to FreeBSD 4.x.

Then I take it, this can be closed?
In any case, if similar problems surface again,
you're always welcome to submit a new report or followup to this one,
asking that it's reopened :)

Giorgos Keramidas                           FreeBSD Documentation Project
keramida@{freebsd.org,ceid.upatras.gr}      http://www.FreeBSD.org/docproj/
